sms.label: SMS
sms.description: Send transactional and promotional SMS messages globally with high delivery rates. Our SMS API handles carrier routing, compliance, and delivery tracking automatically.

email.label: Email
email.description: Deliver transactional emails that land in the inbox, not the spam folder. Built-in templates, A/B testing, and analytics to optimize your email performance.

wallet.label: Wallet
wallet.description: Manage digital wallets, track balances, and process transactions securely. Built-in fraud detection and instant settlement for your financial workflows.

pricing.title: Simple and transparent pricing
pricing.subtitle: plan that fits your needs from sandbox testing to production scale deployments.

card.heading: Unified API Pricing & Features
card.calculatorDescription: Estimate your monthly costs based on SMS volume, email sends, and storage needs. All prices are in DZD with no hidden fees.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about integrating and scaling with AxeDz.

services.question: What services does AxeDz provide?
services.answer: AxeDz is built to serve developers and businesses, providing reliable access to communication infrastructure wherever they operate. By removing barriers related to payments, integrations, and scalability, the platform ensures that teams can build and deploy services efficiently at a high level.

builtFor.question: Who is AxeDz built for?
builtFor.answer: AxeDz is designed for startups, SMEs, and enterprise teams who need reliable SMS, email, voice, and billing APIs with local DZD currency support. Whether you are building a notification system or a full communication suite, our platform scales with you.

billing.question: How does billing work?
billing.answer: We operate on a pay-as-you-go model with transparent pricing in Algerian Dinars (DZD). You can top up your wallet via local payment methods, create invoices, and track every transaction in real-time through the dashboard.

test.question: Can I test the platform before scaling?
test.answer: Absolutely. Every new account comes with free sandbox credits so you can integrate and test all APIs in a staging environment before going live. No credit card is required to start building.

features.feature4: Join a growing ecosystem of developers and teams building scalable, reliable digital products across the country.

payments.title: Payments & Wallet
payments.description: Manage your wallet balance, view transaction history, and configure billing preferences.

activationCard.title: Sandbox Mode Active
activationCard.description: Your account is currently in sandbox mode. API requests are simulated and no real SMS or email messages are sent. Activate production mode to start sending live messages.

infoCards.walletBillingDesc: All charges are deducted directly from your wallet balance — no monthly invoices.
infoCards.payPerUsageDesc: No subscription fees. You only pay for the SMS, emails, and storage you actually use.
infoCards.noSubscriptionDesc: No recurring commitments. Top up your wallet when you need it, use it when you want.
infoCards.autoDeductionDesc: Costs are deducted automatically in real-time as you use the API services.
infoCards.securePaymentsDesc: All transactions are processed through SATIM, Algeria's secure payment gateway.
infoCards.transactionHistoryDesc: Every charge and deposit is logged and visible in your transaction history for full transparency.

notesCard.title: Important Notes
notesCard.productionNote: Production mode cannot be disabled once activated. This action is permanent.
notesCard.balanceNote: A wallet balance is required to use live services. Ensure you have sufficient funds before switching.
notesCard.refundNote: Unused wallet funds are non-refundable but remain available for future usage.
notesCard.supportDesc: Contact our support team for assistance with production activation or billing questions.

walletOverview.title: Wallet Overview
walletOverview.zeroBalance: Your wallet balance is empty. Add funds to start using live services.
walletOverview.lowBalance: Low balance alert! Your current balance is at or below the alert threshold.

quickActions.title: Quick Actions
quickActions.addFundsDesc: Deposit money into your wallet to enable live API usage.
quickActions.setAlertDesc: Get notified when your balance drops below a threshold.
quickActions.billingInfoDesc: Wallet-based billing with automatic deduction from your balance.

transactions.title: Transaction History
transactions.description: A complete log of all wallet transactions including deposits, usage charges, refunds, and adjustments.
transactions.searchPlaceholder: Search by transaction ID, type, or description...
transactions.emptyDesc: Transactions will appear here once you start using your wallet.

paymentHistory.title: Payment History
paymentHistory.description: A record of all payments made to top up your wallet through the payment gateway.
paymentHistory.emptyDesc: Payments will appear here once you top up your wallet.
